question: सर्व नोंदींसाठी जिल्ह्याच्या नावानुसार वर्णानुक्रमाने क्रमवारी लावून जिल्ह्याचे नाव, राज्याचे नाव आणि देशाचे नाव यादी करा.

raw_output: SELECT d.DISTRICT_NAME, s.STATE_NAME, c.COUNTRY_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT d JOIN DIM_STATE s ON d.STATE_ID = s.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_COUNTRY c ON s.COUNTRY_ID = c.COUNTRY_ID ORDER BY d.DISTRICT_NAME ASC;

question: आंध्र प्रदेश राज्यासाठी, जिल्हानुसार गटबद्ध करून, सर्वाधिक गावांच्या संख्येनुसार क्रमवारीत केवळ शीर्ष १० परिणाम दाखवत, जिल्ह्यांची नावे आणि वेगळ्या ULB/RLB गावांच्या नावांची संख्या यादी करा.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.DISTRICT_NAME, COUNT(DISTINCT T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' GROUP BY T2.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME) DESC LIMIT 10
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    d.DISTRICT_NAME,
    COUNT(DISTINCT l.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME) AS village_count
FROM DIM_DISTRICT d
JOIN DIM_LOCATION l ON d.DISTRICT_ID = l.DISTRICT_ID
JOIN DIM_STATE s ON d.STATE_ID = s.STATE_ID
WHERE s.STATE_NAME ILIKE 'Andhra Pradesh'
GROUP BY d.DISTRICT_NAME
ORDER BY village_count DESC
LIMIT 10;
raw_output:

    d.DISTRICT_NAME,
    COUNT(DISTINCT l.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME) AS village_count

question: राज्यांची नावे आणि प्रत्येक राज्यासाठी जिल्हा आयडींची एकूण संख्या यादी करा, जिल्ह्यांच्या संख्येनुसार उतरत्या क्रमाने क्रमवारी लावा, आणि केवळ शीर्ष 5 परिणाम दाखवा.

question: 'भारत' नावाच्या देशासाठी, प्रत्येक राज्याचे नाव त्या राज्यातील जिल्ह्यांच्या एकूण संख्येसह सूचीबद्ध करा, केवळ कमीत कमी एक जिल्हा असलेली राज्ये समाविष्ट करा आणि परिणाम सर्वाधिक ते सर्वात कमी जिल्हा संख्येनुसार क्रमवारीत लावा.

question: उपजिल्ह्यांची नावे, वर्णानुक्रमाने क्रमवारी लावून, ज्यात किमान एक 'ग्रामीण' आणि किमान एक 'शहरी' वर्गीकृत क्षेत्र आहे.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_SECTOR_CATEGORY AS T3 ON T2.SECTOR_ID = T3.SECTOR_ID GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T3.SECTOR_CATEGORY = 'Rural' THEN T3.SECTOR_CATEGORY END) > 0 AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T3.SECTOR_CATEGORY = 'Urban' THEN T3.SECTOR_CATEGORY END) > 0 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT l.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME
FROM DIM_LOCATION l
JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS fet ON l.LOCATION_ID = fet.LOCATION_ID
JOIN DIM_SECTOR_CATEGORY dsc ON fet.SECTOR_ID = dsc.SECTOR_ID
WHERE dsc.SECTOR_CATEGORY = 'Rural'
AND l.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME IN (
    SELECT l2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME
    FROM DIM_LOCATION l2
    JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS fet2 ON l2.LOCATION_ID = fet2.LOCATION_ID
    JOIN DIM_SECTOR_CATEGORY dsc2 ON fet2.SECTOR_ID = dsc2.SECTOR_ID
    WHERE dsc2.SECTOR_CATEGORY = 'Urban'
)
ORDER BY l.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME;
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT l.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME
FROM DIM_LOCATION l
JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS fet ON l.LOCATION_ID = fet.LOCATION_ID
JOIN DIM_SECTOR_CATEGORY dsc ON fet.SECTOR_ID = dsc.SECTOR_ID
WHERE dsc.SECTOR_CATEGORY = 'Rural'
AND l.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME IN (
    SELECT l2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME
    FROM DIM_LOCATION l2
    JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS fet2 ON l2.LOCATION_ID = fet2.LOCATION_ID
    JOIN DIM_SECTOR_CATEGORY dsc2 ON fet2.SECTOR_ID = dsc2.SECTOR_ID
    WHERE dsc2.SECTOR_CATEGORY = 'Urban'
)
ORDER BY l.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME;

question: राज्याचे नाव, जिल्ह्याचे नाव आणि यूएलबी/आरएलबी गावाचे नाव यादी करा, राज्य, जिल्हा आणि गावाच्या नावानुसार गट करून आणि गावाच्या नावानुसावर अक्षरक्रमाने क्रमवारी लावून.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID GROUP BY T3.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME;
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    ds.STATE_NAME,
    dd.DISTRICT_NAME,
    dl.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME
FROM DIM_LOCATION dl
JOIN DIM_DISTRICT dd ON dl.DISTRICT_ID = dd.DISTRICT_ID
JOIN DIM_STATE ds ON dd.STATE_ID = ds.STATE_ID
JOIN DIM_COUNTRY dc ON ds.COUNTRY_ID = dc.COUNTRY_ID
GROUP BY ds.STATE_NAME, dd.DISTRICT_NAME, dl.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME
ORDER BY dl.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ASC;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    ds.STATE_NAME,
    dd.DISTRICT_NAME,
    dl.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME
FROM DIM_LOCATION dl
JOIN DIM_DISTRICT dd ON dl.DISTRICT_ID = dd.DISTRICT_ID
JOIN DIM_STATE ds ON dd.STATE_ID = ds.STATE_ID
JOIN DIM_COUNTRY dc ON ds.COUNTRY_ID = dc.COUNTRY_ID
GROUP BY ds.STATE_NAME, dd.DISTRICT_NAME, dl.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME
ORDER BY dl.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ASC;

question: 'आंध्र प्रदेश' किंवा 'आसाम' या राज्यांमधील सर्व जिल्ह्यांची नावे आणि राज्याची नावे यादी करा, आणि राज्याच्या नावानुसार क्रमवारी लावा.

question: 'चित्तूर' जिल्ह्यातील तालुक्यांची नावे आणि त्यातील शहरी/ग्रामीण स्थानिक संस्था (ULB/RLB) गावांची नावे यादी करा, 'प्रकाशम' जिल्ह्यातही आढळणारे तालुके वगळून, तालुका आणि गावाच्या नावानुसार गट करून आणि तालुक्याच्या नावानुसार अकारानुक्रमाने क्रमवारी लावा.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Chittoor' AND T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME NOT IN (SELECT T4.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T4 ON T3.DISTRICT_ID = T4.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T3.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Prakasam') GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT dl.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, dl.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME
FROM DIM_LOCATION dl
JOIN DIM_DISTRICT dd ON dl.DISTRICT_ID = dd.DISTRICT_ID
WHERE dd.DISTRICT_NAME ILIKE 'Chittur'
AND dl.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME NOT IN (
    SELECT dl2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME
    FROM DIM_LOCATION dl2
    JOIN DIM_DISTRICT dd2 ON dl2.DISTRICT_ID = dd2.DISTRICT_ID
    WHERE dd2.DISTRICT_NAME ILIKE 'Prakasam'
)
GROUP BY dl.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, dl.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME
ORDER BY dl.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC;
raw_output:
SELECT dl.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, dl.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME

    WHERE dd2.DISTRICT_NAME ILIKE 'Prakasam'
)
GROUP BY dl.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, dl.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME
ORDER BY dl.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC;

question: 'भारत' देशातील प्रत्येक राज्यासाठी राज्यांची नावे आणि जिल्हा आयडीची एकूण संख्या यादी करा, केवळ शून्यपेक्षा जास्त जिल्हे असलेली राज्ये समाविष्ट करा, आणि सर्वाधिक जिल्ह्यांच्या संख्येनुसार शीर्ष 5 राज्ये प्रदर्शित करा.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.STATE_NAME, COUNT(T3.DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_COUNTRY AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.COUNTRY_ID = T2.COUNTRY_ID JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T1.COUNTRY_NAME = 'India' GROUP BY T2.STATE_NAME HAVING COUNT(T3.DISTRICT_ID) > 0 ORDER BY COUNT(T3.DISTRICT_ID) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT ds.STATE_NAME, COUNT(dd.DISTRICT_ID) as district_count
FROM DIM_STATE ds
JOIN DIM_COUNTRY dc ON ds.COUNTRY_ID = dc.COUNTRY_ID
JOIN DIM_DISTRICT dd ON ds.STATE_ID = dd.STATE_ID
WHERE dc.COUNTRY_NAME ILIKE 'India'
GROUP BY ds.STATE_ID, ds.STATE_NAME
HAVING COUNT(dd.DISTRICT_ID) > 0
ORDER BY district_count DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:
SELECT ds.STATE_NAME, COUNT(dd.DISTRICT_ID) as district_count
FROM DIM_STATE ds
JOIN DIM_COUNTRY dc ON ds.COUNTRY_ID = dc.COUNTRY_ID
JOIN DIM_DISTRICT dd ON ds.STATE_ID = dd.STATE_ID
WHERE dc.COUNTRY_NAME ILIKE 'India'
GROUP BY ds.STATE_ID, ds.STATE_NAME
HAVING COUNT(dd.DISTRICT_ID) > 0
ORDER BY district_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

question: 'चित्तूर' नावाच्या जिल्ह्यांसाठी देशाचे नाव, राज्याचे नाव आणि जिल्ह्याचे नाव यादी करा, या नोंदींसाठी किमान एक देश रेकॉर्ड अस्तित्वात असल्याची खात्री करा, आणि परिणाम राज्याच्या नावानुसार आणि नंतर देशाच्या नावानुसावरी अल्फाबेटिकली क्रमवारी लावा.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.COUNTRY_NAME, T2.STATE_NAME, T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID INNER JOIN DIM_COUNTRY AS T3 ON T2.COUNTRY_ID = T3.COUNTRY_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Chittoor' GROUP BY T3.COUNTRY_NAME, T2.STATE_NAME, T1.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(T3.COUNTRY_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T2.STATE_NAME ASC, T3.COUNTRY_NAME ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    dc.COUNTRY_NAME,
    ds.STATE_NAME,
    dd.DISTRICT_NAME
FROM DIM_DISTRICT dd
JOIN DIM_STATE ds ON dd.STATE_ID = ds.STATE_ID
JOIN DIM_COUNTRY dc ON ds.COUNTRY_ID = dc.COUNTRY_ID
WHERE dd.DISTRICT_NAME ILIKE 'Chittoor'
ORDER BY ds.STATE_NAME, dc.COUNTRY_NAME;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    dc.COUNTRY_NAME,
    ds.STATE_NAME,
    dd.DISTRICT_NAME
FROM DIM_DISTRICT dd
JOIN DIM_STATE ds ON dd.STATE_ID = ds.STATE_ID
JOIN DIM_COUNTRY dc ON ds.COUNTRY_ID = dc.COUNTRY_ID
WHERE dd.DISTRICT_NAME ILIKE 'Chittoor'
ORDER BY ds.STATE_NAME, dc.COUNTRY_NAME;

question: असम, आंध्र प्रदेश किंवा बिहार राज्यातील ठिकाणांसाठी राज्याचे नाव, जिल्ह्याचे नाव आणि ULB/RLB गावाचे नाव यादी करा, प्रकाशम जिल्ह्यातील ठिकाणे वगळून, राज्य, जिल्हा आणि गावानुसार गट करा आणि गाव व जिल्ह्यानुसार अल्फाबेटिकल क्रमाने लावा.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID INNER JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T3.STATE_NAME IN ('Assam', 'Andhra Pradesh', 'Bihar') AND T2.DISTRICT_NAME NOT IN ('Prakasam') GROUP BY T3.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ASC, T2.DISTRICT_NAME ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    ds.STATE_NAME,
    dd.DISTRICT_NAME,
    dl.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME
FROM DIM_LOCATION dl
JOIN DIM_DISTRICT dd ON dl.DISTRICT_ID = dd.DISTRICT_ID
JOIN DIM_STATE ds ON dd.STATE_ID = ds.STATE_ID
WHERE ds.STATE_NAME ILIKE 'Assam' 
   OR ds.STATE_NAME ILIKE 'Andhra Pradesh' 
   OR ds.STATE_NAME ILIKE 'Bihar'
GROUP BY ds.STATE_NAME, dd.DISTRICT_NAME, dl.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME
HAVING dd.DISTRICT_NAME NOT ILIKE 'Prakasam'
ORDER BY dl.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME, dd.DISTRICT_NAME;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    ds.STATE_NAME,
    dd.DISTRICT_NAME,
    dl.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME
FROM DIM_LOCATION dl
JOIN DIM_DISTRICT dd ON dl.DISTRICT_ID = dd.DISTRICT_ID
JOIN DIM_STATE ds ON dd.STATE_ID = ds.STATE_ID
WHERE ds.STATE_NAME ILIKE 'Assam' 
   OR ds.STATE_NAME ILIKE 'Andhra Pradesh' 
   OR ds.STATE_NAME ILIKE 'Bihar'
GROUP BY ds.STATE_NAME, dd.DISTRICT_NAME, dl.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME
HAVING dd.DISTRICT_NAME NOT ILIKE 'Prakasam'
ORDER BY dl.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME, dd.DISTRICT_NAME;

question: प्रत्येक वर्षासाठी जनगणना वर्ष आणि एकूण अंदाजे मत्स्यपालन यादी करा, हे सुनिश्चित करून की एकूण किमान 0.000 आहे, आणि एकूण अंदाजे मत्स्यपालनानुसार उतरत्या क्रमाने परिणाम क्रमवारी लावा.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.CENSUS_YEAR, SUM(T1.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE) FROM FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_TIME AS T2 ON T1.TIME_ID = T2.TIME_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T3 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T3.LOCATION_ID GROUP BY T2.CENSUS_YEAR HAVING SUM(T1.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE) >= 0.000 ORDER BY SUM(T1.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE) DESC
predicted_sql: SELECT dt.CENSUS_YEAR, SUM(fps.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE) AS TOTAL_EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE FROM FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR fps JOIN DIM_TIME dt ON fps.TIME_ID = dt.TIME_ID GROUP BY dt.CENSUS_YEAR HAVING SUM(fps.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE) >= 0.000 ORDER BY SUM(fps.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE) DESC;
raw_output: SELECT dt.CENSUS_YEAR, SUM(fps.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE) AS TOTAL_EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE FROM FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR fps JOIN DIM_TIME dt ON fps.TIME_ID = dt.TIME_ID GROUP BY dt.CENSUS_YEAR HAVING SUM(fps.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE) >= 0.000 ORDER BY SUM(fps.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE) DESC;

question: उप-जिल्हाचे नाव आणि जनगणना वर्ष, एकत्रित स्थापनांची बेरीज आणि निवासी-व्यावसायिक स्थापनांची बेरीज, उप-जिल्हा आणि जनगणना वर्ष या दोन्हीनुसार गट करून, आणि जनगणना वर्षानुसार कालानुक्रमानुसार क्रमवारीत लावा.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T3.CENSUS_YEAR, SUM(T1.TOTAL_ESTABLISHMENTS), SUM(T1.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL) FROM FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T1 JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T1.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T3.CENSUS_YEAR ORDER BY T3.CENSUS_YEAR ASC
predicted_sql: SELECT dl.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, dt.CENSUS_YEAR, SUM(fet.TOTAL_ESTABLISHMENTS) AS total_establishments_sum, SUM(fet.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL) AS est_residential_commercial_sum FROM DIM_LOCATION dl JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS fet ON dl.LOCATION_ID = fet.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME dt ON fet.TIME_ID = dt.TIME_ID GROUP BY dl.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, dt.CENSUS_YEAR ORDER BY dt.CENSUS_YEAR;
raw_output: SELECT dl.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, dt.CENSUS_YEAR, SUM(fet.TOTAL_ESTABLISHMENTS) AS total_establishments_sum, SUM(fet.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL) AS est_residential_commercial_sum FROM DIM_LOCATION dl JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS fet ON dl.LOCATION_ID = fet.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME dt ON fet.TIME_ID = dt.TIME_ID GROUP BY dl.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, dt.CENSUS_YEAR ORDER BY dt.CENSUS_YEAR;

question: २०१३ च्या जनगणना वर्षासाठी, मत्स्य आणि जलकृषी प्रतिष्ठानांची संख्या ० किंवा अधिक असलेली आणि निवासी व्यावसायिक प्रतिष्ठानांची संख्या ० किंवा अधिक असलेली उपजिल्ह्यांची नावे आणि यूएलबी/आरएलबी गावांची नावे यादी करा, केवळ प्रतिष्ठान एकूणमध्ये किमान एक नोंद असलेली स्थाने समाविष्ट करण्याची खात्री करा आणि परिणाम उपजिल्हा नावानुसार वर्णक्रमानुसार क्रमवारी लावा.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T3 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T3.LOCATION_ID AND T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T4 ON T2.TIME_ID = T4.TIME_ID WHERE T3.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE >= 0.000 AND T2.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL >= 0.000 AND T4.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME HAVING COUNT(T2.FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC

INNER JOIN FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR fps ON l.LOCATION_ID = fps.LOCATION_ID

WHERE fps.TIME_ID = 1
  AND fps.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE >= 0
  AND fet.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL >= 0
